projects.title: The Grand Wedding — Kato & Olivia
projects.description: A stunning 250-guest wedding ceremony and reception held in Kampala. We delivered full venue decor including suspended floral installations, custom chair covers, golden lighting, professional ushers, and a live DJ set that kept the dance floor electric all night.

projects.title: Makerere Graduation Gala 2024
projects.description: An unforgettable graduation celebration for 600 graduates and families. We transformed the main hall with elegant draping, custom centrepieces, professional MCs, and a dance crew that brought the energy to a whole new level.

projects.title: Sweet 21 Birthday Bash — Aisha
projects.description: A vibrant rooftop birthday celebration with a custom pink & gold balloon arch, candy table, DJ set, photo booth, and our signature usher team to welcome over 150 guests in style.

projects.title: St. Mary's College Prom Night
projects.description: The most talked-about highschool prom in Kampala. From the red carpet arrival to the DJ set and dance crew performance — we made sure every student felt like a star.

projects.title: Horizon Group Corporate Awards Night
projects.description: A black-tie corporate awards evening for 400 executives. Full stage production, branded backdrops, professional MC hosting, award ceremony coordination, and a curated entertainment lineup.

projects.title: David & Grace Engagement Ceremony
projects.description: A romantic garden engagement setup with a floral arch, customized backdrop, fairy lights, and intimate table settings for 80 guests. Pure elegance from start to finish.

projects.title: Kampala Live Stage Show
projects.description: A high-energy live concert experience featuring our full sound engineering team, stage lighting rig, LED screens, and event host coordination for a crowd of 1,200 attendees.

projects.title: Kids Wonderland Birthday Party
projects.description: A magical themed birthday party for a 7-year-old with full cartoon decor, a balloon castle, face painting station, and an energetic MC who kept every child entertained.
